videoSnippet.title: Absolute Carnage || Hans vs Nihal || Titled Tuesday 2026

Niemann, Hans Moke (3246) - Nihal Sarin (3348)
Titled Tuesday Grand Prix 2025-2026 (Chess.com) [08] 2026.03.17
B90 Sicilian, Najdorf, Byrne (English) attack

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.Nc3 a6 6.Be3 e6 7.g4 h6 8.f3 b5 9.a3 Bb7 10.Qd2 Nbd7 11.O-O-O Rc8 12.h4 d5 13.exd5 Nxd5 14.Nxd5 Bxd5 15.Kb1 Qc7 16.Be2 Ne5 17.Rhe1 Be7 18.Nf5 exf5 19.Qxd5 O-O 20.Bd4 Qxc2+ 21.Ka2 Nc6 22.Bd3 Qa4 23.Bc3 Nb4+ 24.Bxb4 Bxb4 25.Bxf5 Rc5 26.Qd6 Rxf5 27.Qxb4 Qxb4 28.axb4 Rxf3 29.Re4 f5 30.gxf5 R3xf5 31.Rdd4 Kh7 32.Ka3 R8f6 33.b3 Rf2 34.Rg4 Rg6 35.h5 Rxg4 36.Rxg4 Rf5 37.Rh4 g6 38.hxg6+ Kxg6 39.Kb2 h5 40.Rh1 Kg5 41.Kc3 h4 42.Rg1+ Kh5 43.Rh1 Kg4 44.Rg1+ Kh3 45.Kd4 Kh2 46.Rg4 h3 47.Ke3 Kh1 48.Ke2 Rf8 49.Rg6 h2 50.Rxa6 Rc8 51.Rg6 Rc1 52.Rg5 Rb1 53.Kf2 Rb2+ 54.Kf1 Rxb3 55.Rxb5 Rf3+ 56.Ke2 Kg2 57.Rg5+ Rg3 58.Rf5 h1=Q 59.Rf2+ Kh3 60.Rf4 Qg2+ 61.Rf2 Qe4+ 62.Kf1 Re3
